name: @littlebigbrain/mcp
description: MCP server for little big brain — graph and hybrid search tools for agents

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node prune-build.mjs
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && publint --strict && attw --pack . --profile esm-only
scripts.test: npm run clean:test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test "test-dist/**/*.test.js"
scripts.test:coverage: npm run clean:test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include=test-dist/*.js --test-coverage-exclude=test-dist/*.test.js --test-coverage-exclude=test-dist/stdio.js --test-coverage-exclude=test-dist/test-support.js --test-coverage-lines=90 --test-coverage-branches=70 --test-coverage-functions=85 "test-dist/**/*.test.js"
